--- Generate LLVM IR files(.ll) for host and device
--- Translate the kernel bitcode by using CuPBoP's kernel translator
init_block
; ModuleID = 'gaussian-cuda-nvptx64-nvidia-cuda-sm_50.bc'
source_filename = "./gaussian.cu"
target datalayout = "e-i64:64-i128:128-v16:16-v32:32-n16:32:64"
target triple = "nvptx64-nvidia-cuda"

%struct.__cuda_builtin_threadIdx_t = type { i8 }
%struct.__cuda_builtin_blockIdx_t = type { i8 }
%struct.__cuda_builtin_blockDim_t = type { i8 }
%printf_args = type { i32, i32, i32, i32, i32, i32 }

$_ZN26__cuda_builtin_threadIdx_t17__fetch_builtin_xEv = comdat any

$_ZN25__cuda_builtin_blockIdx_t17__fetch_builtin_xEv = comdat any

$_ZN25__cuda_builtin_blockDim_t17__fetch_builtin_xEv = comdat any

$_ZN26__cuda_builtin_threadIdx_t17__fetch_builtin_yEv = comdat any

$_ZN25__cuda_builtin_blockIdx_t17__fetch_builtin_yEv = comdat any

$_ZN25__cuda_builtin_blockDim_t17__fetch_builtin_yEv = comdat any

@threadIdx = extern_weak dso_local addrspace(1) global %struct.__cuda_builtin_threadIdx_t, align 1
@blockIdx = extern_weak dso_local addrspace(1) global %struct.__cuda_builtin_blockIdx_t, align 1
@blockDim = extern_weak dso_local addrspace(1) global %struct.__cuda_builtin_blockDim_t, align 1
@.str = private unnamed_addr constant [98 x i8] c"blockIdx.x: %d, threadIdx.x: %d, blockIdx.y: %d, threadIdx.y: %d, blockDim.x: %d, blockDim.y: %d\0A\00", align 1, !dbg !0

; Function Attrs: convergent mustprogress noinline norecurse nounwind optnone
define dso_local void @_Z4Fan1PfS_ii(ptr noundef %m_cuda, ptr noundef %a_cuda, i32 noundef %Size, i32 noundef %t) #0 !dbg !1018 {
entry:
  %m_cuda.addr = alloca ptr, align 8
  %a_cuda.addr = alloca ptr, align 8
  %Size.addr = alloca i32, align 4
  %t.addr = alloca i32, align 4
  store ptr %m_cuda, ptr %m_cuda.addr, align 8
  call void @llvm.dbg.declare(metadata ptr %m_cuda.addr, metadata !1022, metadata !DIExpression()), !dbg !1023
  store ptr %a_cuda, ptr %a_cuda.addr, align 8
  call void @llvm.dbg.declare(metadata ptr %a_cuda.addr, metadata !1024, metadata !DIExpression()), !dbg !1025
  store i32 %Size, ptr %Size.addr, align 4
  call void @llvm.dbg.declare(metadata ptr %Size.addr, metadata !1026, metadata !DIExpression()), !dbg !1027
  store i32 %t, ptr %t.addr, align 4
  call void @llvm.dbg.declare(metadata ptr %t.addr, metadata !1028, metadata !DIExpression()), !dbg !1029
  %call = call noundef i32 @_ZN26__cuda_builtin_threadIdx_t17__fetch_builtin_xEv() #4, !dbg !1030
  %call1 = call noundef i32 @_ZN25__cuda_builtin_blockIdx_t17__fetch_builtin_xEv() #4, !dbg !1032
  %call2 = call noundef i32 @_ZN25__cuda_builtin_blockDim_t17__fetch_builtin_xEv() #4, !dbg !1033
  %mul = mul i32 %call1, %call2, !dbg !1034
  %add = add i32 %call, %mul, !dbg !1035
  %0 = load i32, ptr %Size.addr, align 4, !dbg !1036
  %sub = sub nsw i32 %0, 1, !dbg !1037
  %1 = load i32, ptr %t.addr, align 4, !dbg !1038
  %sub3 = sub nsw i32 %sub, %1, !dbg !1039
  %cmp = icmp uge i32 %add, %sub3, !dbg !1040
  br i1 %cmp, label %if.then, label %if.end, !dbg !1041

if.then:                                          ; preds = %entry
  br label %return, !dbg !1042

if.end:                                           ; preds = %entry

define dso_local void @_Z4Fan1PfS_ii(ptr noundef %m_cuda, ptr noundef %a_cuda, i32 noundef %Size, i32 noundef %t) #0 {
entry:
  %m_cuda.addr = alloca ptr, align 8
  %a_cuda.addr = alloca ptr, align 8
  %Size.addr = alloca i32, align 4
  %t.addr = alloca i32, align 4
  store ptr %m_cuda, ptr %m_cuda.addr, align 8
  call void @llvm.dbg.declare(metadata ptr %m_cuda.addr, metadata !1018, metadata !DIExpression()), !dbg !1023
  store ptr %a_cuda, ptr %a_cuda.addr, align 8
  call void @llvm.dbg.declare(metadata ptr %a_cuda.addr, metadata !1024, metadata !DIExpression()), !dbg !1025
  store i32 %Size, ptr %Size.addr, align 4
  call void @llvm.dbg.declare(metadata ptr %Size.addr, metadata !1026, metadata !DIExpression()), !dbg !1027
  store i32 %t, ptr %t.addr, align 4
  call void @llvm.dbg.declare(metadata ptr %t.addr, metadata !1028, metadata !DIExpression()), !dbg !1029
  %0 = call noundef i32 @llvm.nvvm.read.ptx.sreg.tid.x(), !dbg !1030
  %1 = call noundef i32 @llvm.nvvm.read.ptx.sreg.ctaid.x(), !dbg !1034
  %2 = call noundef i32 @llvm.nvvm.read.ptx.sreg.ntid.x(), !dbg !1037
  %mul = mul i32 %1, %2, !dbg !1040
  %add = add i32 %0, %mul, !dbg !1041
  %3 = load i32, ptr %Size.addr, align 4, !dbg !1042
  %sub = sub nsw i32 %3, 1, !dbg !1043
  %4 = load i32, ptr %t.addr, align 4, !dbg !1044
  %sub3 = sub nsw i32 %sub, %4, !dbg !1045
  %cmp = icmp uge i32 %add, %sub3, !dbg !1046
  br i1 %cmp, label %if.then, label %if.end, !dbg !1047

if.then:                                          ; preds = %entry
  br label %return, !dbg !1048

if.end:                                           ; preds = %entry
  %5 = load ptr, ptr %a_cuda.addr, align 8, !dbg !1049
  %6 = load i32, ptr %Size.addr, align 4, !dbg !1050
  %7 = call noundef i32 @llvm.nvvm.read.ptx.sreg.ntid.x(), !dbg !1051
  %8 = call noundef i32 @llvm.nvvm.read.ptx.sreg.ctaid.x(), !dbg !1053
  %mul6 = mul i32 %7, %8, !dbg !1055
  %9 = call noundef i32 @llvm.nvvm.read.ptx.sreg.tid.x(), !dbg !1056
  %add8 = add i32 %mul6, %9, !dbg !1058
  %10 = load i32, ptr %t.addr, align 4, !dbg !1059
  %add9 = add i32 %add8, %10, !dbg !1060
  %add10 = add i32 %add9, 1, !dbg !1061
  %mul11 = mul i32 %6, %add10, !dbg !1062
  %idx.ext = zext i32 %mul11 to i64, !dbg !1063
  %add.ptr = getelementptr inbounds float, ptr %5, i64 %idx.ext, !dbg !1063
  %11 = load i32, ptr %t.addr, align 4, !dbg !1064
  %idx.ext12 = sext i32 %11 to i64, !dbg !1065
  %add.ptr13 = getelementptr inbounds float, ptr %add.ptr, i64 %idx.ext12, !dbg !1065
  %12 = load float, ptr %add.ptr13, align 4, !dbg !1066
  %13 = load ptr, ptr %a_cuda.addr, align 8, !dbg !1067
  %14 = load i32, ptr %Size.addr, align 4, !dbg !1068
  %15 = load i32, ptr %t.addr, align 4, !dbg !1069
  %mul14 = mul nsw i32 %14, %15, !dbg !1070
  %idx.ext15 = sext i32 %mul14 to i64, !dbg !1071
  %add.ptr16 = getelementptr inbounds float, ptr %13, i64 %idx.ext15, !dbg !1071
  %16 = load i32, ptr %t.addr, align 4, !dbg !1072
  %idx.ext17 = sext i32 %16 to i64, !dbg !1073
  %add.ptr18 = getelementptr inbounds float, ptr %add.ptr16, i64 %idx.ext17, !dbg !1073
  %17 = load float, ptr %add.ptr18, align 4, !dbg !1074
  %div = fdiv contract float %12, %17, !dbg !1075
  %18 = load ptr, ptr %m_cuda.addr, align 8, !dbg !1076
  %19 = load i32, ptr %Size.addr, align 4, !dbg !1077
  %20 = call noundef i32 @llvm.nvvm.read.ptx.sreg.ntid.x(), !dbg !1078
  %21 = call noundef i32 @llvm.nvvm.read.ptx.sreg.ctaid.x(), !dbg !1080
  %mul21 = mul i32 %20, %21, !dbg !1082
  %22 = call noundef i32 @llvm.nvvm.read.ptx.sreg.tid.x(), !dbg !1083
  %add23 = add i32 %mul21, %22, !dbg !1085
  %23 = load i32, ptr %t.addr, align 4, !dbg !1086
  %add24 = add i32 %add23, %23, !dbg !1087
  %add25 = add i32 %add24, 1, !dbg !1088
  %mul26 = mul i32 %19, %add25, !dbg !1089
  %idx.ext27 = zext i32 %mul26 to i64, !dbg !1090
  %add.ptr28 = getelementptr inbounds float, ptr %18, i64 %idx.ext27, !dbg !1090
  %24 = load i32, ptr %t.addr, align 4, !dbg !1091
  %idx.ext29 = sext i32 %24 to i64, !dbg !1092
  %add.ptr30 = getelementptr inbounds float, ptr %add.ptr28, i64 %idx.ext29, !dbg !1092
  store float %div, ptr %add.ptr30, align 4, !dbg !1093
  br label %return, !dbg !1094

  ret void, !dbg !1094

; ModuleID = 'gaussian-cuda-nvptx64-nvidia-cuda-sm_50.bc'
source_filename = "./gaussian.cu"
target datalayout = "e-i64:64-i128:128-v16:16-v32:32-n16:32:64"
target triple = "nvptx64-nvidia-cuda"

%struct.__cuda_builtin_threadIdx_t = type { i8 }
%struct.__cuda_builtin_blockIdx_t = type { i8 }
%struct.__cuda_builtin_blockDim_t = type { i8 }
%printf_args = type { i32, i32, i32, i32, i32, i32 }

$_ZN26__cuda_builtin_threadIdx_t17__fetch_builtin_xEv = comdat any

$_ZN25__cuda_builtin_blockIdx_t17__fetch_builtin_xEv = comdat any

$_ZN25__cuda_builtin_blockDim_t17__fetch_builtin_xEv = comdat any

$_ZN26__cuda_builtin_threadIdx_t17__fetch_builtin_yEv = comdat any

$_ZN25__cuda_builtin_blockIdx_t17__fetch_builtin_yEv = comdat any

$_ZN25__cuda_builtin_blockDim_t17__fetch_builtin_yEv = comdat any

@threadIdx = extern_weak dso_local addrspace(1) global %struct.__cuda_builtin_threadIdx_t, align 1
@blockIdx = extern_weak dso_local addrspace(1) global %struct.__cuda_builtin_blockIdx_t, align 1
@blockDim = extern_weak dso_local addrspace(1) global %struct.__cuda_builtin_blockDim_t, align 1
@.str = private unnamed_addr constant [98 x i8] c"blockIdx.x: %d, threadIdx.x: %d, blockIdx.y: %d, threadIdx.y: %d, blockDim.x: %d, blockDim.y: %d\0A\00", align 1, !dbg !0
@intra_warp_index = global i32 0
@inter_warp_index = global i32 0
@block_size = external global i32
@block_size_x = external global i32
@block_size_y = external global i32
@block_size_z = external global i32
@grid_size_x = external global i32
@grid_size_y = external global i32
@grid_size_z = external global i32
@block_index_x = external dso_local thread_local global i32
@block_index_y = external dso_local thread_local global i32
@block_index_z = external dso_local thread_local global i32
@warp_shfl = external thread_local global [32 x i32]
@warp_vote = external thread_local global [32 x i8], align 32

; Function Attrs: convergent mustprogress noinline norecurse nounwind optnone
define dso_local void @_Z4Fan1PfS_ii(ptr noundef %m_cuda, ptr noundef %a_cuda, i32 noundef %Size, i32 noundef %t) #0 {
entry:
  %m_cuda.addr = alloca ptr, align 8
  br label %entry_after_block_sync_1

entry_after_block_sync_1:                         ; preds = %entry
  %a_cuda.addr = alloca ptr, align 8
  %Size.addr = alloca i32, align 4
  %t.addr = alloca i32, align 4
  br label %entry_after_block_sync_1_after_block_sync_3

entry_after_block_sync_1_after_block_sync_3:      ; preds = %entry_after_block_sync_1
  call void @llvm.nvvm.barrier0()
  br label %entry_after_block_sync_1_after_block_sync_2

entry_after_block_sync_1_after_block_sync_2:      ; preds = %entry_after_block_sync_1_after_block_sync_3
  store ptr %m_cuda, ptr %m_cuda.addr, align 8
  call void @llvm.dbg.declare(metadata ptr %m_cuda.addr, metadata !1018, metadata !DIExpression()), !dbg !1023
  store ptr %a_cuda, ptr %a_cuda.addr, align 8
  call void @llvm.dbg.declare(metadata ptr %a_cuda.addr, metadata !1024, metadata !DIExpression()), !dbg !1025
  store i32 %Size, ptr %Size.addr, align 4
  call void @llvm.dbg.declare(metadata ptr %Size.addr, metadata !1026, metadata !DIExpression()), !dbg !1027
  store i32 %t, ptr %t.addr, align 4
  call void @llvm.dbg.declare(metadata ptr %t.addr, metadata !1028, metadata !DIExpression()), !dbg !1029
  %0 = call noundef i32 @llvm.nvvm.read.ptx.sreg.tid.x(), !dbg !1030
  %1 = call noundef i32 @llvm.nvvm.read.ptx.sreg.ctaid.x(), !dbg !1034
  %2 = call noundef i32 @llvm.nvvm.read.ptx.sreg.ntid.x(), !dbg !1037
  %mul = mul i32 %1, %2, !dbg !1040
  %add = add i32 %0, %mul, !dbg !1041
  %3 = load i32, ptr %Size.addr, align 4, !dbg !1042
  %sub = sub nsw i32 %3, 1, !dbg !1043
  %4 = load i32, ptr %t.addr, align 4, !dbg !1044
  %sub3 = sub nsw i32 %sub, %4, !dbg !1045

  call void @llvm.nvvm.barrier0()
  br label %if.end64_after_block_sync_12

if.end64_after_block_sync_12:                     ; preds = %if.end64_after_block_sync_14
  call void @llvm.nvvm.barrier0()
  br label %if.end64_after_block_sync_1, !dbg !1240

if.end64_after_block_sync_1:                      ; preds = %if.end64_after_block_sync_12
  ret void, !dbg !1240

if_end:                                           ; preds = %if.then48_after_block_sync_10, %if.then11_after_block_sync_7, %if.end12_after_block_sync_0
  br label %if_end_after_block_sync_31

if_end_after_block_sync_31:                       ; preds = %if_end
  call void @llvm.nvvm.barrier0()
  br label %if_end_after_block_sync_30

if_end_after_block_sync_30:                       ; preds = %if_end_after_block_sync_31
  br label %if_end1

if_end1:                                          ; preds = %if_end_after_block_sync_30
  br label %if_end1_after_block_sync_33

if_end1_after_block_sync_33:                      ; preds = %if_end1
  call void @llvm.nvvm.barrier0()
  br label %if_end1_after_block_sync_32

if_end1_after_block_sync_32:                      ; preds = %if_end1_after_block_sync_33
  br label %if.end64
}

if.end12_after_block_sync_0:                      ; preds = %if.end12_after_block_sync_8_after_block_sync_9_after_block_sync_18_after_block_sync_23_after_block_sync_29
  %171 = load i32, ptr %local_inter_warp_idx, align 4, !dbg !1237
  %172 = load i32, ptr %local_intra_warp_idx, align 4, !dbg !1237
  %173 = mul i32 %171, 32, !dbg !1237
  %thread_idx19 = add i32 %172, %173, !dbg !1237
  %174 = getelementptr i1, ptr %cmp47_intra_warp_, i32 %thread_idx19, !dbg !1237
  %175 = load i1, ptr %174, align 1, !dbg !1237
  br i1 %175, label %intra_warp_init, label %if_end, !dbg !1237

intra_warp_init:                                  ; preds = %if.end12_after_block_sync_0
  store i32 0, ptr %local_intra_warp_idx, align 4
  br label %intra_warp_cond

intra_warp_inc:                                   ; preds = %if.then48
  %176 = load i32, ptr %local_intra_warp_idx, align 4
  %intra_warp_index_increment = add i32 %176, 1
  store i32 %intra_warp_index_increment, ptr %local_intra_warp_idx, align 4
  br label %intra_warp_cond

intra_warp_cond:                                  ; preds = %intra_warp_inc, %intra_warp_init
  %177 = load i32, ptr %local_intra_warp_idx, align 4
  %178 = icmp ult i32 %177, %6
  br i1 %178, label %if.then48, label %reset_block, !llvm.loop !1238

if.then48:                                        ; preds = %intra_warp_cond
  %179 = load ptr, ptr %m_cuda.addr, align 8, !dbg !1241, !llvm.mem.parallel_loop_access !1243
  %180 = load i32, ptr %Size.addr, align 4, !dbg !1244, !llvm.mem.parallel_loop_access !1243
  %181 = load i32, ptr %local_inter_warp_idx, align 4, !dbg !1245, !llvm.mem.parallel_loop_access !1243
  %182 = load i32, ptr %local_intra_warp_idx, align 4, !dbg !1245, !llvm.mem.parallel_loop_access !1243
  %183 = mul i32 %181, 32, !dbg !1245
  %thread_idx2 = add i32 %182, %183, !dbg !1245
  %184 = getelementptr i32, ptr %xidx_intra_warp_, i32 %thread_idx2, !dbg !1245
  %185 = load i32, ptr %184, align 4, !dbg !1245, !llvm.mem.parallel_loop_access !1243
  %add49 = add nsw i32 %185, 1, !dbg !1246
  %186 = load i32, ptr %t.addr, align 4, !dbg !1247, !llvm.mem.parallel_loop_access !1243
  %add50 = add nsw i32 %add49, %186, !dbg !1248
  %mul51 = mul nsw i32 %180, %add50, !dbg !1249
  %187 = load i32, ptr %local_inter_warp_idx, align 4, !dbg !1250, !llvm.mem.parallel_loop_access !1243
  %188 = load i32, ptr %local_intra_warp_idx, align 4, !dbg !1250, !llvm.mem.parallel_loop_access !1243
  %189 = mul i32 %187, 32, !dbg !1250
  %thread_idx6 = add i32 %188, %189, !dbg !1250
  %190 = getelementptr i32, ptr %yidx_intra_warp_, i32 %thread_idx6, !dbg !1250
  %191 = load i32, ptr %190, align 4, !dbg !1250, !llvm.mem.parallel_loop_access !1243
  %192 = load i32, ptr %t.addr, align 4, !dbg !1251, !llvm.mem.parallel_loop_access !1243
  %add52 = add nsw i32 %191, %192, !dbg !1252
  %add53 = add nsw i32 %mul51, %add52, !dbg !1253
  %idxprom54 = sext i32 %add53 to i64, !dbg !1241
  %arrayidx55 = getelementptr inbounds float, ptr %179, i64 %idxprom54, !dbg !1241
  %193 = load float, ptr %arrayidx55, align 4, !dbg !1241, !llvm.mem.parallel_loop_access !1243
  %194 = load ptr, ptr %b_cuda.addr, align 8, !dbg !1254, !llvm.mem.parallel_loop_access !1243
  %195 = load i32, ptr %t.addr, align 4, !dbg !1255, !llvm.mem.parallel_loop_access !1243
  %idxprom56 = sext i32 %195 to i64, !dbg !1254
  %arrayidx57 = getelementptr inbounds float, ptr %194, i64 %idxprom56, !dbg !1254
  %196 = load float, ptr %arrayidx57, align 4, !dbg !1254, !llvm.mem.parallel_loop_access !1243
  %mul58 = fmul contract float %193, %196, !dbg !1256
  %197 = load ptr, ptr %b_cuda.addr, align 8, !dbg !1257, !llvm.mem.parallel_loop_access !1243
  %198 = load i32, ptr %local_inter_warp_idx, align 4, !dbg !1258, !llvm.mem.parallel_loop_access !1243
  %199 = load i32, ptr %local_intra_warp_idx, align 4, !dbg !1258, !llvm.mem.parallel_loop_access !1243
  %200 = mul i32 %198, 32, !dbg !1258
  %thread_idx = add i32 %199, %200, !dbg !1258
  %201 = getelementptr i32, ptr %xidx_intra_warp_, i32 %thread_idx, !dbg !1258
  %202 = load i32, ptr %201, align 4, !dbg !1258, !llvm.mem.parallel_loop_access !1243
  %add59 = add nsw i32 %202, 1, !dbg !1259
  %203 = load i32, ptr %t.addr, align 4, !dbg !1260, !llvm.mem.parallel_loop_access !1243
  %add60 = add nsw i32 %add59, %203, !dbg !1261
  %idxprom61 = sext i32 %add60 to i64, !dbg !1257
  %arrayidx62 = getelementptr inbounds float, ptr %197, i64 %idxprom61, !dbg !1257
  %204 = load float, ptr %arrayidx62, align 4, !dbg !1262, !llvm.mem.parallel_loop_access !1243
  %sub63 = fsub contract float %204, %mul58, !dbg !1262
  store float %sub63, ptr %arrayidx62, align 4, !dbg !1262, !llvm.mem.parallel_loop_access !1243
  br label %intra_warp_inc

reset_block:                                      ; preds = %intra_warp_cond
  store i32 0, ptr %local_intra_warp_idx, align 4
  br label %if.then48_after_block_sync_17

if.then48_after_block_sync_17:                    ; preds = %reset_block
  br label %if.then48_after_block_sync_17_after_block_sync_22

if.then48_after_block_sync_17_after_block_sync_22: ; preds = %if.then48_after_block_sync_17
  br label %if.then48_after_block_sync_17_after_block_sync_22_after_block_sync_28

if.then48_after_block_sync_17_after_block_sync_22_after_block_sync_28: ; preds = %if.then48_after_block_sync_17_after_block_sync_22
  br label %if.then48_after_block_sync_10, !dbg !1263

if.then48_after_block_sync_10:                    ; preds = %if.then48_after_block_sync_17_after_block_sync_22_after_block_sync_28
  br label %if_end, !dbg !1263

if.end64:                                         ; preds = %if_end1_after_block_sync_32, %if.then_after_block_sync_5
  br label %if.end64_after_block_sync_25

if.end64_after_block_sync_25:                     ; preds = %if.end64
  br label %if.end64_after_block_sync_19

if.end64_after_block_sync_19:                     ; preds = %if.end64_after_block_sync_25
  br label %if.end64_after_block_sync_14

if.end64_after_block_sync_14:                     ; preds = %if.end64_after_block_sync_19
  br label %if.end64_after_block_sync_12

if.end64_after_block_sync_12:                     ; preds = %if.end64_after_block_sync_14
  br label %if.end64_after_block_sync_1, !dbg !1264

if.end64_after_block_sync_1:                      ; preds = %if.end64_after_block_sync_12
  ret void, !dbg !1264

if_end:                                           ; preds = %if.then48_after_block_sync_10, %if.then11_after_block_sync_7, %if.end12_after_block_sync_0
  br label %if_end_after_block_sync_31

if_end_after_block_sync_31:                       ; preds = %if_end
  br label %if_end_after_block_sync_30

if_end_after_block_sync_30:                       ; preds = %if_end_after_block_sync_31
  br label %if_end1

if_end1:                                          ; preds = %if_end_after_block_sync_30
  br label %if_end1_after_block_sync_33

if_end1_after_block_sync_33:                      ; preds = %if_end1
  br label %if_end1_after_block_sync_32

if_end1_after_block_sync_32:                      ; preds = %if_end1_after_block_sync_33
  br label %if.end64
}

  %arrayidx62 = getelementptr inbounds float, ptr %197, i64 %idxprom61, !dbg !1257
  %204 = load float, ptr %arrayidx62, align 4, !dbg !1262, !llvm.mem.parallel_loop_access !1243
  %sub63 = fsub contract float %204, %mul58, !dbg !1262
  store float %sub63, ptr %arrayidx62, align 4, !dbg !1262, !llvm.mem.parallel_loop_access !1243
  br label %intra_warp_inc

reset_block:                                      ; preds = %intra_warp_cond
  store i32 0, ptr %local_intra_warp_idx, align 4
  br label %if.then48_after_block_sync_17

if.then48_after_block_sync_17:                    ; preds = %reset_block
  br label %if.then48_after_block_sync_17_after_block_sync_22

if.then48_after_block_sync_17_after_block_sync_22: ; preds = %if.then48_after_block_sync_17
  br label %if.then48_after_block_sync_17_after_block_sync_22_after_block_sync_28

if.then48_after_block_sync_17_after_block_sync_22_after_block_sync_28: ; preds = %if.then48_after_block_sync_17_after_block_sync_22
  br label %if.then48_after_block_sync_10, !dbg !1263

if.then48_after_block_sync_10:                    ; preds = %if.then48_after_block_sync_17_after_block_sync_22_after_block_sync_28
  br label %if_end, !dbg !1263

if.end64:                                         ; preds = %if_end1_after_block_sync_32, %if.then_after_block_sync_5
  br label %if.end64_after_block_sync_25

if.end64_after_block_sync_25:                     ; preds = %if.end64
  br label %if.end64_after_block_sync_19

if.end64_after_block_sync_19:                     ; preds = %if.end64_after_block_sync_25
  br label %if.end64_after_block_sync_14

if.end64_after_block_sync_14:                     ; preds = %if.end64_after_block_sync_19
  br label %if.end64_after_block_sync_12

if.end64_after_block_sync_12:                     ; preds = %if.end64_after_block_sync_14
  br label %if.end64_after_block_sync_1, !dbg !1264

if.end64_after_block_sync_1:                      ; preds = %if.end64_after_block_sync_12
  ret void, !dbg !1264

if_end:                                           ; preds = %if.then48_after_block_sync_10, %if.then11_after_block_sync_7, %if.end12_after_block_sync_0
  br label %if_end_after_block_sync_31

if_end_after_block_sync_31:                       ; preds = %if_end
  br label %if_end_after_block_sync_30

if_end_after_block_sync_30:                       ; preds = %if_end_after_block_sync_31
  br label %if_end1

if_end1:                                          ; preds = %if_end_after_block_sync_30
  br label %if_end1_after_block_sync_33

if_end1_after_block_sync_33:                      ; preds = %if_end1
  br label %if_end1_after_block_sync_32

if_end1_after_block_sync_32:                      ; preds = %if_end1_after_block_sync_33
  br label %if.end64
}

; Function Attrs: convergent mustprogress noinline norecurse nounwind optnone
define dso_local void @_Z4Fan1PfS_ii(ptr noalias noundef %m_cuda, ptr noalias noundef %a_cuda, i32 noundef %Size, i32 noundef %t) #0 {
entry:
  %local_intra_warp_idx = alloca i32, align 4
  %local_inter_warp_idx = alloca i32, align 4
  store i32 0, ptr %local_inter_warp_idx, align 4
  %0 = load i32, ptr @block_size, align 4
  %m_cuda.addr = alloca ptr, align 8
  br label %entry_after_block_sync_1

entry_after_block_sync_1:                         ; preds = %entry
  %a_cuda.addr = alloca ptr, align 8
  %Size.addr = alloca i32, align 4
  %t.addr = alloca i32, align 4

entry_after_block_sync_1_after_block_sync_3:      ; preds = %entry_after_block_sync_1
  br label %intra_warp_init

intra_warp_init:                                  ; preds = %entry_after_block_sync_1_after_block_sync_3
  store i32 0, ptr %local_intra_warp_idx, align 4
  br label %intra_warp_cond

intra_warp_inc:                                   ; preds = %return
  %1 = load i32, ptr %local_intra_warp_idx, align 4
  %intra_warp_index_increment = add i32 %1, 1
  store i32 %intra_warp_index_increment, ptr %local_intra_warp_idx, align 4
  br label %intra_warp_cond

intra_warp_cond:                                  ; preds = %intra_warp_inc, %intra_warp_init
  %2 = load i32, ptr %local_intra_warp_idx, align 4
  %3 = icmp ult i32 %2, %0

entry_after_block_sync_1_after_block_sync_2:      ; preds = %intra_warp_cond

  %6 = load i32, ptr %local_intra_warp_idx, align 4, !dbg !1034

  %7 = load i32, ptr @block_size_x, align 4, !dbg !1034

  %sub = sub nsw i32 %11, 1, !dbg !1047
  %12 = load i32, ptr %t.addr, align 4, !dbg !1048, !llvm.mem.parallel_loop_access !1021
  %sub3 = sub nsw i32 %sub, %12, !dbg !1049
  %cmp = icmp uge i32 %add, %sub3, !dbg !1050

  br label %return, !dbg !1052

if.end:                                           ; preds = %entry_after_block_sync_1_after_block_sync_2
  %13 = load ptr, ptr %a_cuda.addr, align 8, !dbg !1053, !llvm.mem.parallel_loop_access !1021
  %14 = load i32, ptr %Size.addr, align 4, !dbg !1054, !llvm.mem.parallel_loop_access !1021
  %15 = load i32, ptr @block_size_x, align 4, !dbg !1055

  %19 = mul i32 %18, 4, !dbg !1060

  %2 = getelementptr ptr, ptr %0, i32 0
  %3 = load ptr, ptr %2, align 8
  %4 = getelementptr ptr, ptr %0, i32 1
  %5 = load ptr, ptr %4, align 8
  %6 = getelementptr ptr, ptr %0, i32 2
  %7 = load i32, ptr %6, align 4

  %9 = load i32, ptr %8, align 4
  call void @_Z4Fan1PfS_ii(ptr %3, ptr %5, i32 %7, i32 %9)
  ret void
}

define void @Fan2PfS_S_iii_wrapper(ptr noalias %0) {

  ret void
}
